ksa_text: Design and implement AI adoption strategy that aligns with organizational vision, mission, and goals, including change enablement, technology integration, stakeholder engagement, and organizational readiness assessment.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on scope grounds: out-of-scope work (2 anti-signals: training delivery, stakeholder engagement programs, or business development). Composite minimal (0.0000). AI Data Quality Manager (ISO) interprets and applies regulatory requirements; does not build systems, deliver training curricula, or develop business cases.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in AI compliance role descriptions. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working AI Data Quality Manager (ISO).
